title: clutia hirsuta var. hirsuta
intro: Clutia hirsuta var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy clutia, is a type of plant species within the Clutia genus, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. Traditionally, the hairy clutia plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the hairy clutia plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts can be found in various herbal remedies and supplements.
